  "summary_en": "Strong risk-on session in Taipei with TAIEX +1.76% and TSMC +3.66% leading, but the tape is selective: TSMC and AI/HPC names rip while UMC (2303) and ASE (3711) lag despite stronger ADR moves overnight — suggesting local profit-taking on second-tier semis even as foreign flows return to large-cap AI beneficiaries.
